title: NVIDIA Financial Data Analysis
description:
I am currently conducting a business analysis of NVIDIA and need you to complete the following steps.
Please visit NVIDIA’s annual report page (reference link: https://investor.nvidia.com/financial-info/financial-reports/default.aspx)
Please access page 52 of the 2025 Form 10-K and page 47 of the 2022 Form 10-K, extract the three items: Revenue, Gross Profit, and Net Income, and write them into an Excel file; the first row of the Excel should contain the years, the first column should contain the data names, and fill in the data accordingly.
Please calculate the 2025 Gross Margin. If it exceeds 70%, calculate the Gross Margin for all years and write it in the last row; otherwise, calculate the Net Margin for all years and write it in the last row; 【Note: all calculations must be performed using Excel formulas, written into the table, and save the Excel file as [nvidia_finance_analysis.xlsx]】
Using the data calculated in the previous step, generate a line chart of margin growth from 2020 to 2025 (if step 2 calculated Net Margin, then present a Net Margin line chart; if Gross Margin was calculated, then present a Gross Margin growth line chart), mark appropriate data points, and save the image as [nvidia_margin.jpg]

score_criteria.content: [nvidia_finance_analysis.xlsx] Correct integration of 2020-2025 data
[nvidia_finance_analysis.xlsx] Correctly determines that Gross Margin should be calculated (because 2025 GM 75.02%)
[nvidia_finance_analysis.xlsx] Gross Margin value is calculated correctly (the cell must have a complete Excel formula)
[nvidia_net_margin.jpg] Line chart shape is correct

title: Industrial Value-Added Growth Analysis
description: You are required to perform an analysis of national data on industrial value-added growth, following the steps below:Please visit the National Data page (reference link: https://data.stats.gov.cn/tablequery.htm?code=AA020B)In the “Monthly” section, go to “Industry” and locate the main value-added growth and growth rate. Select the nationwide region for June 2025, and in the indicators, retain only those with year-on-year growth greater than zero. Write these into an Excel file; set the Excel title as “June 2025 Nationwide Industrial Value-Added Growth Rate.” The first column should contain the names of the retained indicators, the second column should contain the data for this month, and the third column should contain the year-on-year growth (%) for this month.Select the top 10 indicators in June 2025 by year-on-year growth, create a pie chart, and calculate the proportion of each indicator converted into ten thousand tons as the unit. The title should be “Proportion of the Top 10 Indicators by Year-on-Year Growth in June 2025 Nationwide Region.” Also provide a legend below the pie chart. 【Note: all calculations must be performed using Excel formulas, written into the table, and save the Excel file as [data_analysis.xlsx]】Save the pie chart as a .jpg file with the filename [The_proportion_of_the_top_ten_indicators.jpg]

score_criteria.content: [data_analysis] correctly integrates the national regions in June 2025, and the metric shows positive growth compared with the same period last year
Retain the top 10 metrics for growth in June 2025 compared to the same period last year
[data_analysis] The first ten metric ratio values are calculated correctly (the cell must contain a complete Excel formula)
[The_proportion_of_the_top_ten_indicators] Pie chart shape is correct
Correct legend and title

title: ROE Analysis of Moutai and Wuliangye
description:
I am currently analyzing the return on equity for Guizhou Moutai and Wuliangye. Please complete the following steps:

Please check the annual report pages for Guizhou Moutai and Wuliangye (reference links:

Guizhou Moutai: https://vip.stock.finance.sina.com.cn/corp/go.php/vCB_Bulletin/stockid/600519/page_type/ndbg.phtml
Wuliangye: https://vip.stock.finance.sina.com.cn/corp/go.php/vCB_Bulletin/stockid/000858/page_type/ndbg.phtml)
For each company, access the consolidated income statement and consolidated balance sheet from the 2020–2024 financial reports. Extract the following three data points:

Net profit attributable to shareholders of the parent company
Beginning shareholders’ equity
Ending shareholders’ equity
Write these into an Excel file. The first row should list the years, the first column should list the data items, and the results should be filled in accordingly. The numbers must be displayed as percentages, formatted to two decimal places.
Calculate the return on equity (ROE) for 2020–2024 and write it into the bottom row. Important: All calculations must be done using Excel formulas (not manual calculations). Save the file as [Return on Equity of Guizhou Moutai and Wuliangye.xlsx].
From the two company tables, extract only the calculated ROE values and write them into a new Excel file. The first row should list the years, and the first column should list the company names. Save this file as [Analysis of Return on Equity of Guizhou Moutai and Wuliangye.xlsx].
Using the data calculated in the previous step, generate a line chart of ROE for 2020–2024. Label the appropriate data points, and highlight in red the years where Guizhou Moutai’s ROE exceeds Wuliangye’s. Insert the chart into the Excel file [Analysis of Return on Equity of Guizhou Moutai and Wuliangye.xlsx] and also save the image separately as [Analysis of Return on Equity of Guizhou Moutai and Wuliangye.jpg].

score_criteria.content: [Shareholders' Equity Return of Guizhou Maotai and Wuliangye.xlsx] correctly fills in the data for 2020–2024
[Shareholders' Equity Returns of Guizhou Maotai and Wuliangye.xlsx] Data Calculations are Correct
[Analysis of Shareholders' Equity Returns of Guizhou Maotai and Wuliangye.xlsx] Data is Written Correctly
[Analysis of Shareholders' Equity Returns of Guizhou Maotai and Wuliangye.xlsx] Correctly red-marks data that meets the requirements
[Analysis of Shareholders' Equity Returns of Guizhou Maotai and Wuliangye.jpg] Line chart is correct

title: Liquor Industry Profitability Analysis
description: I am currently working on the 2024 annual profitability analysis report of Kweichow Moutai and Wuliangye Yibin, and need you to complete the following steps.Please visit the 2024 annual report page of Kweichow Moutai (600519) (reference link: https://www.cninfo.com.cn/new/disclosure/detail?orgId=gssh0600519&announcementId=1222993915&announcementTime=2025-04-03)Please visit the 2024 annual report page of Wuliangye Yibin (000858) (reference link: https://www.cninfo.com.cn/new/disclosure/detail?plate=szse&orgId=gssz0000858&stockCode=000858&announcementId=1223311608&announcementTime=2025-04-26)Please go to page 8 of Kweichow Moutai’s 2024 annual report, consolidated income statement, and extract the current-period figures for “Operating Profit” and “Of which: Operating Revenue” from the cross table;Please go to page 9 of Wuliangye’s 2024 annual report, consolidated income statement, and extract the current-period amounts for “Operating Profit” and “Of which: Operating Revenue” from the cross table;Write the extracted information into an Excel file, with the first row containing the company names, the first column containing the data items, and fill in the corresponding data.Please calculate the operating profit margin of both listed companies, using the formula: Operating Profit Margin = (Operating Profit / Operating Revenue) × 100%. 【Note: all calculations must be performed using Excel formulas, write the results into the “Operating Profit Margin” column of the table, and save the Excel file as [Liquor_Industry_Profitability_Comparison.xlsx]】Using the data calculated in the previous step, generate a combo chart, with the base data presented as a bar chart and the growth rate as a line chart. Mark appropriate specific data points, and save the image as [Liquor_Industry_Profitability_Comparison.jpg]

score_criteria.content: [Baijiu industry P & L positive metric comparison.xlsx] correctly captures the financial data formulated by two annual reports
[Baijiu industry P & L positive metric comparison.xlsx] uses the Excel built-in formula to correctly calculate Operating Profit Margin
[Baijiu industry P & L positive metric comparison.jpg] The chart type is a combination chart, and the data row and column distribution is correct

title: AAPL Stock Analysis and Visualization
description:
I am doing quantitative trading analysis, and you need to complete it according to the following steps:
Visit the Apple Inc. AAPL stock price page (reference link: https://hk.finance.yahoo.com/quote/AAPL/history/).
Filter the data from March 26, 2025 to May 26, 2025, extract the two columns of Date and Close Price, and write them into an Excel file; in the first row of the Excel file write the column names, in the first column write Date, and in the second column write Close Price.
Add three new columns to the right of the existing table, namely SMA5, SMA10, and Signal, and respectively calculate the 5-day simple moving average and the 10-day simple moving average; in the Signal column, if the SMA5 value of the day is greater than the SMA10 value, then fill in the number 1 in this cell; otherwise, fill in the number 0. If in the Signal column valid values cannot be calculated due to insufficient data (Excel will display #N/A or other errors), keep these natural error values. Save the table as AAPL_data.xlsx.
Then filter out the rows that contain valid values for all indicators, and plot a line chart, clearly marking the trends of daily Close Price, 5-day line, and 10-day line, and save the picture as AAPL_report.png.

score_criteria.content: [AAPL_data.xlsx] Correct integration of data from March 26, 2025 to May 26, 2025
[AAPL_data.xlsx] Correctly calculates the 5-day and 10-day lines and signal (the cells must have complete Excel formulas)
[AAPL_report.png] Line chart shape is correct
[AAPL_data.xlsx] Invalid data in the 5-day and 10-day lines is filled with 0 or other non-N/A data
Directly extracting relevant 5-day and 10-day line data from the webpage is invalid

title: 2024 Cannes Winners Analysis Report
description:
I need to generate a complete analysis report of the 2024 Cannes Film Festival winning films. Please follow the workflow below:
 Visit the official Cannes Film Festival website (https://www.festival-cannes.com/), find the 2024 winners list page, and collect information on the winning films of the major awards, including the Palme d’Or, Grand Prix, Best Director, Best Actor, and Best Actress.
 For each winning film, collect the following detailed information from IMDb (https://www.imdb.com/) or other authoritative film databases: English title and Chinese title, director’s name, main actors (top 3), genre/subject, production country, release date, running time, IMDb rating, and synopsis (within 200 words).
 For each winning film, find legitimate viewing channel information, prioritizing mainstream streaming platforms such as Netflix, Amazon Prime, Disney+, etc. If the film is not yet available on streaming, mark it as “In Theaters” or “Coming Soon,” and record the specific viewing platform link if available.
 Organize all collected information into a structured Excel table and save it as [cannes_2024_winners.xlsx], with the following columns: Award Name, Chinese Title, English Title, Director, Main Cast, Genre, Production Country, Release Date, Running Time, IMDb Rating, Synopsis, Viewing Platform, and Viewing Link.
 Based on the collected data, write a film analysis report containing the following sections: 2024 Cannes Film Festival Winners Overview (total number of winning films, distribution of main winning countries); Detailed Introductions of Winning Films by Award (each film in one paragraph, including basic information and synopsis); Analysis of Winning Film Genres (statistics on the distribution of genres among winners); Analysis of Internationalization Trends (analysis of production country distribution and diversity among winning films). At the end of the report, add a “Viewing Guide” section, listing all films’ viewing platforms categorized by platform (Netflix titles, Amazon Prime titles, domestic platforms, etc.).
 Save the final report as a Word document [cannes_2024_film_analysis_report.docx], and ensure the document includes: Cover Page (title, production date, producer), Main Content (according to the structure in step 5), and Appendix (screenshots or data summary of the Excel table).

score_criteria.content: Accurate acquisition of official website information
Successfully obtained the list of major awards winners for 2024 from the Cannes official website, with complete movie details
Collect 12 basic information points (title, director, actors, etc.) for each movie
Comprehensive viewing channel search, searching and recording legal viewing platforms and links for each movie
Accurate file naming, strictly in accordance with [cannes_2024_winners.xlsx]
The table structure is complete, including all required 13 column fields
The report structure is complete, including five parts: overview, detailed introduction, type analysis, trend analysis, and viewing suggestions
Accurate statistical analysis in the report, providing a practical viewing guide
Sorted by platform for easy user selection
The main file cannot be opened and used

title: Billboard Data Collection and Analysis
description:
I am searching for more music. I hope I can find more beautiful songs on the Billboard list. I need you to help me do it. 
Visit the Billboard Global 200 list (reference link: https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-global-200/)
Collect the top 5 songs from each of the 4 most recent weekly Global 200 charts using the link I gave you in step 1, starting from the week of the current month that covers the first day of the month and going back 3 more months, collect the songs from the week that covers the first day of the month of the past 3 months.
Create an Excel spreadsheet named [billboard200_monthly.xlsx] with five columns:
Week Number (Count the first week of past four months as 1 and the week of current month as 4)
Song Title: The name of the song
Artist Name: The name(s) of all artists performing the song
Male Artist: Enter 1 if there is at least one male artist involved in the song (regardless of how many). Otherwise, enter 0.
Female Artist: Enter 1 if there is at least one female artist involved in the song (regardless of how many). Otherwise, enter 0.
Include songs found in step 2. Each row in the spreadsheet should represent one unique song. (Notice: no duplicates allowed in the spreadsheet. If the same song appears in multiple weeks’ top 5, skip that duplicate entry. If all the top 5 songs in a given week are duplicates, skip that entire week)
Generate a bar chart, and save it as [gender_versus_number.jpg]. The x-axis shows each gender type. The y-axis shows the number of songs in that gender from the spreadsheet. Include data labels for each bar.

score_criteria.content: [billboard200_monthly] correctly integrates the music from the first week of this month and the first week of the past three months
[billboard200_monthly] contains no duplicate songs
[billboard200_monthly] correctly labels the gender of the singer
[gender_versus_number] bar chart is correct

title: 2023 Global Climate Anomaly Assessment
description:
I need to conduct an assessment of global abnormal climate in 2023, following the steps below:
 From the website (Index of /pub/data/cmb/ersst/v5/netcdf), access the NOAA global temperature anomaly dataset and download the 2023 monthly CSV file. From the EU Copernicus program, download the 2023 global NDVI (Vegetation) data and convert it into CSV using QGIS or the Python GDAL library. Finally, download the SPI ERA5 Short Term data from Copernicus (European Observatory).
 Integrate the data (aligned by 0.5° grid and by month).
 Next, create an Excel file, with the main table indicators being: Time | Latitude | Longitude | Temperature Anomaly | Precipitation | Drought Index (SPI-6) | NDVI Value.
 Perform data correction:
Temperature anomaly values should be within [-10℃, +10℃]; values out of range should be marked as NULL.
Negative monthly precipitation values should be replaced with 0.
When the drought index < -2.0 and the temperature anomaly > +1℃, mark as a heat-drought event.
 Calculate the global 1° × 1° grid Climate Anomaly Index (CAI) and save it in a new column:
CAI=0.7×(T−μTσT)+0.3×∣SPIσP∣CAI=0.7 \times (\frac{T-\mu_T}{\sigma_T})+0.3 \times |\frac{SPI}{\sigma_P}|CAI=0.7×(σTT−μT)+0.3×∣σPSPI∣
 where SPI represents precipitation, and the mean and variance are calculated over the time scale.
 Save and name the file as Climate_2023_Analysis.xlsx.
 Based on the CAI values, plot a global heatmap (using QGIS and the WGS84 coordinate grid), following these rules:
Regions with CAI > 2.5 are marked red (RGB: 230, 0, 0).
Regions with CAI between 1.5 and 2.5 are marked yellow (RGB: 255, 255, 0).
Regions with CAI ≤ 1.5 are marked blue (RGB: 0, 150, 255).
 The following regions must be labeled:
The Arctic Circle (north of 66.5°N).
The Mediterranean drought corridor (30°N–45°N, 10°W–40°E).
The Amazon rainforest region (10°N–25°S, 80°W–50°W).
 Save the image as Global_Heatmap_2023.png.

score_criteria.content: Successfully downloaded data from the specified URL
Data correction
Heat map includes three-color annotations and designated areas

title: Gini Index and Life Expectancy Analysis
description:
I am into world economics. I recently want to discover the relationship between the Gini index and life expectancy at birth, total (years). You can access the data on the world bank open data. To be more specific, I want to investigate how the top 10 countries with the highest Gini index and their life expectancy at birth, total (years) looks like. Therefore, I would love you to take these steps:
Visit https://data360.worldbank.org/en/indicator/WB_WDI_SI_POV_GINI?view=datatable, here you can find a table with countries' Gini index. I need you to collect the top 10 countries with highest Gini index from this list by sorting their Gini index value.
Based on the top 10 countries you collect, I need you to go to https://data360.worldbank.org/en/indicator/WB_WDI_SP_DYN_LE00_IN?view=datatable and search in the query box for their corresponding life expectancy at birth, total (years). 
Now I need you repete step 1 and 2 in a reverse sequence: go to https://data360.worldbank.org/en/indicator/WB_WDI_SP_DYN_LE00_IN?view=datatable and find a table with countries' life expectancy at birth, total (years). I need you to collect the top 10 countries with highest life expectancy at birth, total (years) from this list by sorting their values.
Based on the top 10 countries you collect, I need you to go to https://data360.worldbank.org/en/indicator/WB_WDI_SI_POV_GINI?view=datatable and search in the query box for their corresponding Gini index. 
After all, I need you to put all the info in a spreadsheet called [gini_life.xlsx], with 2 pairs of columns, with 1 pair of columns showing the top 10 Gini index countries' names and their corresponding Gini index and life expectancy at birth, total (years). Another pair of columns showing the top 10 life expectancy at birth, total (years) countries' names and their corresponding life expectancy and Gini index. Make sure there are 2 columns separating these 2 pairs of columns. If you see anywhere without the Gini index or life expectancy number, just use '-' as a placeholder in the value.
Then I need you to draw 2 line charts based on these 2 pairs of columns. Each with 2 lines representing the Gini index and life expectancy. For locations without Gini index, just skip them and their life expectancy when plotting. Name them [plot_no1] and [plot_no2]

score_criteria.content: [gini_life] correctly integrates the Top 10 Gini index countries and their corresponding life expectancy
[gini_life] correctly integrates the Top 10 life expectancy countries and their corresponding Gini index
In [gini_life], the two columns within the two sets of data are correctly separated
In [gini_life], missing data points are correctly filled in with a dash (-)
The line chart shape in both [plot_no1] and [plot_no2] is correct

title: Task Prioritization and Schedule Adjustment
description:
Suppose you are a product manager at a tech company. The current time is 2:00 PM on July 29, 2025, and you only have 5 hours of effective time today. Your schedule system is fully packed with tasks, which are stored in the file arrangement.xlsx. Some tasks are urgent, some are important, and some are easy to overlook but have long-term impact. In addition, your team works in a “strong collaboration + high responsiveness” style, which means you must not only consider the priority of your own tasks but also respond to others’ requests in a timely manner and handle unexpected issues.
First, you need to evaluate the urgency of the tasks based on their descriptions and importance.
 According to the urgency and importance of the tasks, establish appropriate evaluation criteria, and arrange the tasks using a priority queue as the standard.
 I am providing you with a set of tools for simulating simple Google Calendar API operations, which include a program named googlecalendar_api_simulator.py and a supporting instruction document simulator_introduction.md. You need to read the instruction document and try interacting with the program in order to record your schedule plan on the calendar. You must save both the JSON-format requests you submit and the JSON-format responses from the program into a file named history.jsonl. The available calendar_id is "Hk9Nw8KsRd5X".
Suppose that after you finish communicating with team member 1, two urgent ad-hoc tasks appear. Please adjust the original plan accordingly. The ad-hoc tasks are stored in the file emergency.xlsx.
 Synchronize the adjustments to the calendar: first delete the original plan, then insert the revised plan.
 Finally, please help summarize the completion status of each task.

score_criteria.content: Before emergency item is added: Urgency level ranking C >= A, B > E, F, G, H
Before emergency item is added: Uses comprehensive explanation and importance for reasoning to complete the sorting
Before emergency item is added: Develops evaluation criteria and correctly calculates the priority (value) of each task based on those criteria
Before emergency item is added: Writes code or uses direct reasoning to complete the task arrangement
Before emergency item is added: When using the API simulator, first clears the calendar and gets correct feedback
Before emergency item is added: Uses the insert function to package the task description and time into an input JSON for interaction and gets the corresponding feedback
After emergency item is added: Determines the current time point, remaining available time, and the completion status of each task
After emergency item is added: Writes code or uses reasoning to re-adjust the subsequent task arrangement
After emergency item is added: Uses the delete function to delete plans after 3:30 PM
After emergency item is added: Uses the insert function to submit the modified plan
After emergency item is added: The statistically obtained completion status matches the actual situation
Before emergency item is added: Task D is not completed at the designated time point (3 PM)
Before emergency item is added: Task C is not completed before 5 PM
After emergency item is added: Task Y is not completed before 4:30 PM
After emergency item is added: Task C is not completed before 5 PM
After arrangement: Tasks A, B, C, D, X, and Y are not all completed

title: NeurIPS 2025 Travel Planning
description:
I’m planning to go to NeurIPS 2025 from New York. Help me figure out a good travel plan.

PLEASE check the official site first and make sure the NeurIPS 2025 conference dates (December 2–7, 2025) and main location (San Diego Convention Center, San Diego, California, USA) are accurate, and cross-check with another reliable source just to be safe.

Also note that registration badge pick-up begins on December 1, 2025, and there will be a second official location in Mexico City hosting the same content for ~500 attendees.

Then, get the basic info like the conference time, location, and submission deadline. Also, check if the full conference schedule has been released — if not, provide last year’s schedule structure as a reference.

Give me two travel options from New York to San Diego:
1. Cheap plan: okay with layovers, decent hotel.
Fast plan: shortest flight, nicer hotel, total budget max $2,200.

List flights and hotels clearly: names, times, ratings, and prices. Wrap it up with a quick comparison and your recommendation, and draft an email for travel approval.
Put all the information into a properly formatted Excel file, if possible.

score_criteria.content: Successfully visited the official website and confirmed the correct meeting dates (December 2–7, 2025) and main venue location (San Diego Convention Center, San Diego, California, USA) for NeurIPS 2025
Cross-validated the conference information, including the registration badge collection date (December 1, 2025) and information regarding the second official venue (Mexico City)
Correctly executed the conditional logic regarding the meeting schedule (if the complete 2025 schedule is unavailable, provided last year's schedule structure as a reference)
Provided two complete travel plans that meet the constraints: a "Cheap Plan" and a "Fast Plan"
The "Fast Plan" complies with a total budget of ≤ $2,200
Generated a plan comparison, recommendations, and a draft email for travel application
Successfully integrated all information into a properly formatted Excel file
Failure to generate the Excel file correctly, or the file content is empty
Provided factually incorrect information (e.g., incorrect meeting date, location, or budget overrun)

title: Enterprise Name Matching and Updating
description:

title: Gaming Companies Market Research
description:
Help me research the gaming companies in this Excel spreadsheet to check if they provide services in Europe and North America. Please focus specifically on the US and European markets, conducting searches and analysis across the following dimensions:
Please note: Focus on information available as of September 15, 2025. If you encounter more recent developments, please note them separately but prioritize data from before this cutoff date.
Step 1: Product Overview
 Search for the company's main product/service list (as of September 15, 2025)
 Identify the type of each product (games/apps/services, etc.)
 Confirm product launch dates and primary markets
 
Step 2: Product Analysis 1. Domain Analysis
 Search for European and American domains: .com (US), .eu (EU), .uk (UK), .de (Germany), .fr (France), etc.
 Look for Europe/America-related subdomains: us., eu., en., global., etc.
 Check if domain registration addresses are in Europe/America (based on registration information before September 15, 2025)
 Observe domain branding strategy positioning
 
2. App Store Distribution
 Focus on checking Google Play/App Store availability in US, UK, Germany, France, and other European/American regions (app store status as of September 15, 2025)
 Check publication status on Steam (US) platform
 Confirm support for major European/American languages: English, German, French, etc.
 
3. Social Media Presence
 Search for accounts on mainstream European/American platforms: Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, etc.
 Review if published content targets European/American time zones and user habits (analyze content published before September 15, 2025)
 Check customer service reply languages (primarily English)
 
4. Business Registration Information
 Search for company registration in the US (Delaware, California, and other states) (registration records before September 15, 2025)
 Look for subsidiaries or offices in EU/UK/Germany, etc.
 Check for European/American investors or business partners
 
5. Compliance and Certifications
 Search for GDPR (EU data protection) compliance (certifications obtained before September 15, 2025)
 Check for relevant US industry certifications or licenses
 Review if privacy policies mention European/American legal clauses
 
6. News and Announcements
 Search for coverage by European/American media (TechCrunch, The Verge, Reuters, etc.) (reports published before September 15, 2025)
 Look for official company statements about entering US/European markets
 Monitor comments from European/American industry analysts
 
7. Recruitment Information
 Check LinkedIn for positions in US, UK, Germany, and other locations (job postings published before September 15, 2025)
 Search for customer service, operations, marketing roles in European/American time zones
 Check if English/German and other European/American language skills are required
 
8. Payment and Logistics
 Check if USD and EUR payments are supported (payment methods available as of September 15, 2025)
 Verify support for mainstream European/American payment methods (PayPal, Stripe, credit cards, etc.)
 Understand if localized customer service and logistics are available for Europe/America
 
Please provide specific evidence and links, with particular emphasis on noting the specific European/American countries/regions where services are offered. When citing sources, please include the publication/update date when available. After completing this research, fill in the information collected for each dimension into the Excel spreadsheet.

score_criteria.content: Able to find their corresponding products from the company name
Able to batch process a large amount of company name data in an Excel sheet and execute tasks according to commands without freezing or getting stuck
For a single product in Step 2 product analysis, performs analysis across 8 dimensions and collects comprehensive information for each dimension
During Step 2 product analysis, provides corresponding sources as supporting evidence
During Step 2 product analysis, provides the latest data from June 2024 onwards or 2025
During Step 2 product analysis, provides the latest data from 2023 to May 2024
During Step 2 product analysis, provides a reasonable analysis and summary of the information collected for each dimension
Able to create new fields for each dimension in Excel and fill in the aforementioned analysis into the corresponding Excel fields
Returns an Excel file
All collected information is from before 2025.9.15
Freezes or gets stuck while executing tasks
Does not find the product name, and instead performs Step 2 analysis directly on the company name
Only provides company domain name and other information, but no game product information
Collected information is only from 2022 or earlier
Unable to collect information from different channels, e.g., missing listing status on Google Play, App Store, or Steam
During Step 2, fails to analyze data across all eight dimensions
Fails to fill the output Excel sheet with the data collected in Step 1 and Step 2
Collected information is from after 2025.9.15

title: Training Camp Registration Analysis
description:
1. First, filter by theme to select activities with the theme "TitanData Data & AI Training Camp".
2. Remove supplier test data, i.e., data where company is "Xinda, Xinda Tech, or X-Tech".
3. Separate registration data between CloudEngine employees and non-CloudEngine employees. CloudEngine employees are filtered by company field values of "Yunqing Tech、Qingtian Data、Feiteng Network、Feiteng Network Limited Company, CloudEngine, TitanData".
4. Output CloudEngine's registration information.
5. Perform data analysis on non-CloudEngine registration data: 
  1. Count total number of registrations
  2. Count number of registrations by each registration channel
  3. List companies of registrants and the number of registrants from each company
  4. Analyze registrants' industry/job role/city information, preferably with visualization

7. Format as a message suitable for posting on office platforms like Teams/Feishu, rather than outputting a document or report.

score_criteria.content: Successfully selected TitanData Data and AI Experiment Training Camp activities

TitanData employees and non-TitanData employees are classified accurately, with an error rate of less than 5%

Successfully output the company and frequency of non-TitanData employees separately and generated [TitanData_external_list.xlsx]
All statistical data is calculated correctly with clear logic
Created various types of professional charts (pie charts, bar charts, maps, etc.) to display industry, job role, and city distribution information
IM message format meets specifications, has clear hierarchy, and prominent key information

TitanData employee identification error

Chart data does not match statistical results

reference_answer_description:
1. Overall Registration Status
- Total registrations: 57 people
- External client coverage: Estimated 41 client companies, 47 people from external organizations
- TitanData internal participation: 10 people
2. Industry Distribution
- Software & Internet dominates (38.3%, 18 people), aligning with the technical event positioning
- Manufacturing, Gaming, and Financial Services show high participation (10.6% each, 5 people), demonstrating continuous demand for cloud services and digital transformation trends
- Retail, Automotive, Media & Entertainment and other industries also participated, reflecting industry diversification
3. Job Role Distribution
- High proportion of technical decision-makers: Developer / Engineer accounts for 40.4% (19 people), IT Professional or Technical Manager 16 people
- Senior leadership participation: Total of 6 people (12.8%), including VP 2 people, IT Executive 1 person, Business Executive 2 people, CFO / CMO 1 person
4. Geographic Distribution
- Primarily from Beijing: 45 people (95.7%)
- Other cities: Huainan 1 person, Shenzhen 1 person
5. Marketing Channel Performance
- Main channel outstanding performance: Exhibition Poster QR Code contributed 61.7% of registrations (29 people)
- Stable Direct Access ratio: 25.5% (12 people), demonstrating brand influence
- Multi-channel synergy:
  - SMS Link: 2 people
  - Share: 1 person
  - Event QR Code: 1 person
  - Poster QR Code: 1 person
  - Information Query QR Code: 1 person

title: Find Thailand Lawyers for Chinese Biopharma Clients
description:
I need to find lawyers who meet all of the following criteria:
1. The lawyer is based in Thailand.
2. The lawyer’s law firm has been recognized or recommended by either Chambers or The Legal 500 (the two leading legal ranking directories).
3. The lawyer has experience serving Chinese corporate clients.
4. The lawyer has previously provided services to clients in the biopharmaceutical industry.

If you find lawyers who meet these conditions, please organize the results in a table with the following fields: lawyer’s name, law firm name, email address, the URL of the lawyer’s profile page on the firm’s official website, and whether the lawyer speaks Chinese. Also provide a downloadable, editable Excel file named [target_lawers.xlsx].

Please find as many qualified candidates as possible, but keep the total number to no more than 10.

score_criteria.content: The [target_lawers] file/spreadsheet contains the lawyer's name, email address, and personal biography
Every lawyer listed in the [target_lawers] file/spreadsheet works in Thailand
The official website introduction corresponding to each row of lawyer information in the [target_lawers] file is accurate and correctly matches the lawyer
The law firm of the lawyer listed in the first row of the [target_lawers] file has been recognized or recommended by Chambers or Legal 500
The lawyer in the first row of the [target_lawers] file has provided services to Chinese corporate clients
The lawyer in the first row of the [target_lawers] file has provided services to clients in the biopharmaceutical industry

The [target_lawers] file contains at least 5 candidate lawyers, and the last lawyer listed works in Thailand, whose firm is recognized or recommended by Chambers or Legal 500, and has served Chinese corporate clients

title: ZA Multi-Hit Move Coverage Analysis
description: I’m playing Pokémon Legends: ZA. Moves with multi-hit characteristics can quickly complete tasks and earn points in the Battle District. Please find the Pokémon in ZA that can learn the greatest number of multi-hit moves and can be obtained early via an NPC trade. I want to study the type coverage of this Pokémon’s multi-hit moves. Present your results in an Excel table: put the types of the multi-hit moves this Pokémon can learn in the first column, and list all types in Pokémon ZA as the header of the first row. The table’s cells should show the damage multiplier where the row is the attacking move’s type and the column is the defending type. Finally, based on this analysis, give the set of defending types that this Pokémon can hit for 2× damage. You may use the type calculator at www.pkmn.help to verify your calculations.

score_criteria.content: Identify that the qualifying Pokémon is Heracross (Chinese: 赫拉克罗斯; Japanese: ヘラクロス; English: Heracross). Answers in any of these languages are acceptable.
In the analyzed Excel sheet, list 4 types of multi-hit moves that the specified Pokémon can learn in the first column.
All damage multipliers in the Excel table are 1/2, 1, or 2; mathematically equivalent representations are acceptable.
The final set of defending types that can be hit for 2× damage is: Flying, Ground, Rock, Bug, Fire, Water, Grass, Psychic, Ice, Dark. Order may vary.
Outputting the table as plain text instead of providing an Excel result.

title: Jupiter Exploration Blog
description: Suppose you are a space exploration enthusiast. Your friend recently recommended a website: https://www.solarsystemscope.com/. Search for Jupiter's moons on Wikipedia, list their names and brief descriptions, and collect relevant text materials about human history related to Jupiter. Finally, integrate all these pieces of information into an excellent blog post about the importance of Jupiter in our solar system, and mark the sources of the information at the end of the article.

title: Collect Scientific Research Progress
description:
Summary of the Latest Scientific Research Achievement Search  
Please collect data following these steps:  
1. Visit the official website of the Chinese Academy of Sciences (CAS): https://www.cas.cn/  
2. Scroll the mouse to find the "Scientific Research Progress" button located in the lower left section, then click it to open the page.  
3. Locate all scientific research progress pages dated 2025/07/02, click to open and read the full text, then extract the following information:  
   - Title  
   - Name of the online published magazine/journal  
   - Research institution to which the work belongs (Source)  
   - Summary of the article's significance  
4. Create a new PPT slide, organize the above information into a table for presentation. Each row represents one scientific research progress, and the columns are in the following order: Title, Magazine/Journal Name, Affiliated Research Institution, Summary of Significance.

score_criteria.content: Compile 6 research progress items

Each research progress item corresponds to the following 6 items respectively: Scientists propose LAG-3 cis-proximity activation mechanism and new autoimmune treatment strategy, Institute of Biophysics, Cell; Study reveals the impact of different cyclization methods on screening results in DNA-encoded cyclic peptide libraries, Shanghai Institute of Materia Medica, JACS Au; Progress in blade-coated all-polymer solar cells research, Shanghai Advanced Research Institute, Advanced Science; Study reveals key nucleases and mechanisms for removing RNA primers in plant plastid DNA replication, Center for Excellence in Molecular Plant Sciences, Nature Plants; Development of a novel AI engine for cell identity identification, Beijing Institute of Genomics, Genome Biology; Progress in single-molecule analysis of anti-aging oligopeptides using solid-state nanopores combined with machine learning, Chongqing Institute of Green and Intelligent Technology, Chemical Engineering Journal.

The final PPT presentation includes charts, with each row representing one research progress item, and columns showing title, journal/publication name, affiliated research institution, and summary of article importance
